description: A derby style reinterpretation of the classic boat shoe, this low-top pair from woodland is made of beautifully tanned soft leather. Crafted from handpicked Italian leather, this shoe is revamps your off-duty staples with subtle sophistication. Style this with corduroy pants or denims and a tee. You can also wear this sockless with tonal cargo shorts. UpperSquare-toed leather upper with overlays at the midfoot and heelLow top stylingThree-hole central lace upsStitch detail at the seams of the toe boxPadded tongueNubuck inner liningMidsoleRuber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole herringbone grooves on the forefoot and heelShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
